basic_details.short_information: DLSA Sitapur is now open for 1 vacancy of Stenographer post for candidates retired as Stenographer from District Court or Collectorate Court, with applications accepted offline from 29-05-2026 to 30-06-2026 through the official website of District Legal Services Authority Sitapur.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired as Stenographer from District Court or Collectorate Court

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
